title.en: In this way, he can push the limits.

content.en:
This time, the energy of the ten Heavenly Pole Fruits exploded, assisting Ye Tian to attack the seventh layer realm of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique.

Originally, Ye Tian needed to master the cultivation of the realm if he wanted to cultivate the seventh layer of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique, but the energy of the ten Heavenly Extreme Fruits was helping Ye Tian break this limit, allowing his physical body to transform to a point where he could cultivate the seventh layer of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique.

In this way, he can push the limits.

Time passed slowly, and a month passed in the blink of an eye.

this day.

Ye Tian's skin began to crack, no, it should be said that his entire body was cracking.

Then, Ye Tian's physical body began to reorganize and become more powerful.

Rumble!!!

A terrifying physical aura erupted from Ye Tian's body, and at the same time, his Chaos Golden Desolate Technique finally stepped into the seventh layer realm.

He can cultivate the seventh-layer technique of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique.

After breaking the limit, Ye Tian could continue to improve his physical strength, but his cultivation was still at the limit of the Cosmic God.

It's like breaking a shackle.

"I thought that ten Heavenly Pole Fruits were enough, but I didn't expect that in the end, I still consumed another 10 Heavenly Pole Fruits, in order to break the limit of the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique, I crossed the level to cultivate the seventh layer of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique, and fully exhausted 21 Heavenly Pole Fruits. But this breakthrough is too significant, I have broken the cultivation requirements of the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique, if I cultivate the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique to a certain level in the Universe God Realm, then my physical body will reach an incredible level!" Ye Tian said excitedly.

Immediately, he swallowed another Heavenly Extreme Fruit and officially cultivated the seventh layer of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique.

With the help of the Heavenly Extreme Fruit, the progress of the seventh layer of the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique was very fast, and the physical body could be improved at the same time.

In this way, Ye Tian started a long-term cultivation in this forest.

In a flash, three years have passed.

Ye Tian had been in retreat for three years, and he didn't know anything about the situation of the sons of other eras, and he didn't care at all.

"It's been three years, I've exhausted all the Heavenly Extreme Fruits, and I have barely cultivated the seventh layer of the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique to the Xiaocheng realm, but my physical body is many times stronger, even if I don't have any gains in the Origin Realm next, this time alone, the harvest is worth it!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Rise!

Ye Tian is not going to stay here, his two goals have not been achieved yet.

The first is to copy the god-level extreme strength talent, and he has not encountered it so far, although the previous four creatures are very powerful, they are only the ultimate strength talent of the mystery level.

Obviously, it is really difficult to find the ultimate strength talent of the Arcane level, and it takes a certain amount of luck and time.

The second goal is to find the Well of Origin, and that is the greatest opportunity!

Ye Tian had obtained a trace of the Universe Origin and knew the benefits of the Universe Origin, and the Well of the Origin may not be as good as a trace of the Universe Origin, but it would definitely not be too bad.

If he obtained the Well of Origin again, his accumulation would be extremely terrifying.

If he obtained a few Origin Wells, Ye Tian was definitely sure that he would grow up in a short period of time and reach an incredible level.

--------

Before, Ye Tian was not familiar with the Origin Realm, but now that he had the Black Panther as a guide, he occasionally hypnotized other creatures, and gradually got to know a little bit about the Origin Realm.

They didn't know where the Well of Origin was, but they knew that there were some powerful creatures nearby.

Therefore, Ye Tian tried his best to avoid encountering some Source Emperors and the territory of Source Ancestors, otherwise if he really ran into a Source Ancestor, he estimated that he would not even have time to escape.

this day.

Ye Tian came to a grassland, his eyes shining with a hint of expectation.

According to his continuous interrogation of nearby creatures, he learned that there is a powerful race living in this grassland-the triangular blood cow!

The Triangle Blood Cow Clan was just a high-level Source Beast clan, but it made many Source Kings extremely jealous.

The Triangle Blood Cow clan has the Triangle Blood Bull King, although it is also a high-level source beast, but it can fight the Source King, plus a large number of Triangle Blood Cow Clansmen, it is enough to kill a Source King.

This is the news that Ye Tian got.

"The Triangle Blood Bull King is just a high-level source beast, but he can fight the source king, if it is placed in the outside world, it is normal, but in the origin realm, the power of the source beast comes completely from the strength of the physical body and the power of talent. And the strength talent is one of the main talents of their combat power, but the ordinary source beast can only be used for the arcane-level strength talent at most, but the Triangle Blood Bull King is so special, maybe he has a god-level extreme strength talent!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Although it is not clear whether this guess is accurate, it is a hope.

So, Ye Tian entered this grassland, looking for the traces of the Triangle Blood Bull King.

Once his guess is really confirmed, it will make a lot of money, and it will even make you understand the mystery of extreme talent.

Ye Tian kept teleporting, looking for the Triangle Blood Bull King.

Suddenly, there was a sound of vibration.

Knock knock knock!!

Ye Tian felt the shaking of the earth, and immediately began to probe the surrounding situation with his divine sense and copying talent.

"Triangle Blood Cow!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed, after searching for so long, he finally found the triangular blood cow clan.

Wow!

Ye Tian quickly approached the Triangle Blood Cow Clan, but was soon disappointed.

Because, this group does not have the Triangle Blood Bull King, obviously this tribe is just one of the Triangle Blood Bull Groups in this grassland, not the group with the Triangle Blood Bull King.

A month later.

Ye Tian was a little impatient, for such a long time, he had found several triangular blood cow groups, but he had not found any trace of the triangular blood cow king.

"There's another triangular blood cow herd!"

Ye Tian was not excited at the moment, and flew over at a speed that was neither fast nor slow.

He soon discovered that it was a pothole, and although there was a lot of grass around it, there was a small lake in the pit, and around the lake were caves that spread deep into the earth, and the triangular blood cattle lived in these caves.

Some of the triangular blood cows swim in the lakes, some graze in the meadows, and some sleep.

Ye Tian immediately turned on the copying talent and explored the situation here.

The triangular blood cow was swept away by Ye Tian's copying talent, and the disappointment became heavier and heavier.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian's expression was overjoyed, he explored a cave space deep in the pit, in the cave space, a triangular blood cow king that was much larger than ordinary triangular blood cow was lying there sleeping.

"Triangle Blood Bull King!"

Ye Tian was excited.

What really excited him was the strength talent possessed by the Triangle Blood Bull King.

Strength Talent: God Level (Extreme)

"The strength talent of the Triangle Blood Bull King is indeed the ultimate god level!"

Ye Tian was excited, and immediately tried to copy its strength talent.

"God-level (extreme) strength talent, copy successfully!"

Seeing this scene, Ye Tian finally breathed a sigh of relief.
